details: Beginning pipeline self-reflection analysis for layer_norm_rm v2 run2. All evidence files gathered: 4 breadcrumb files, 2 execution logs, op_design.md, .tdd_state.json, git history (13 commits on current run).

Self-reflection report written to self_reflection.md. 3 new pipeline improvement issues added (#12, #13, #14). Key finding: 50% of pipeline time (57min) spent on tolerance spec error in square_centered stage.
